description: Composition Light grey trousers made of 100% cotton, has two pockets on the sides with two patch pockets at the back with stitch detailing, belt loops at waist, a zip and button closure Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Crafted from soft cotton and designed with a cut that offers a flattering silhouette, these chinos from highlander make for a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Pair them with a casual shirt, throw over a blazer and slip into suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32”
